summary: THREE_ROW: 3-state Markov chain with P=[[0.7, 0.2, 0.1],[0.3, 0.4, 0.3],[0.2, 0.3, 0.5]] converges to stationary π from two different starts (e_1 and e_3). Top: 3-node BLUE digraph with bidirectional arrows. Middle: BLUE/GREEN/RED always_redraw bars on ValueTracker k_tr (0→30) + YELLOW outline of π reference. Bottom: live k + TV-distance shrinking. which_tr switches start.
